description: Stop + unregister the supervised fleet-monitor dashboard and remove the rendered artifacts (launcher, watchdog, unit). The durable mirror is PRESERVED — teardown is about the service, not the recorded history.
rules: bootout/disable the unit + its watchdog, then remove the rendered files
MIRROR_DIR (the recorded history) is never touched
KEEP_SCRIPTS=1 leaves the rendered launcher/watchdog on disk (unit removed only)
usage: All vars optional. LABEL, FLEET_HOME, KEEP_SCRIPTS. Output: ${RECORD_STORE}/down.json.
limitation: Removes the LOCAL control host's service only.
